nodes.name: White-bellied goshawk
nodes.summary: White-bellied goshawk（Tachyspiza haplochroa）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-bellied goshawk。

nodes.name: White-bellied goshawk
nodes.summary: The white-bellied goshawk (Tachyspiza haplochroa) also known as the New Caledonia goshawk, white-bellied sparrowhawk, or katabeialek by locals is a species of bird of prey in the family Accipitridae. It is endemic to New Caledonia. This species was formerly placed in the genus Accipiter. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, subtropical or tropical moist montane forest, dry savanna, and heavily degraded former forest. It is threatened by habitat loss. References "New Caledonia Goshawk | The Peregrine Fund". peregrinefund.org. Retrieved 2025-06-19.

nodes.name: Tachyspiza
